mapper.sql: id, duration_name, duration_value, duration_sort, status, remark, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select:
select
from t_live_time_duration_config where is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 order by duration_sort asc, id asc
select id, duration_name as name, duration_value as value from t_live_time_duration_config where is_deleted = 0 order by duration_sort asc, id asc

select
from t_live_time_duration_config where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
update t_live_time_duration_config
duration_name = #{durationName},
duration_value = #{durationValue},
duration_sort = #{durationSort},
status = #{status},
remark = #{remark},
create_by = #{createBy},
update_by = #{updateBy},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_live_time_duration_config (duration_name, duration_value, duration_sort, status, remark, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values (#{durationName}, #{durationValue}, #{durationSort}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, now(), now(), #{isDeleted})
